description: Provides the opportunity to establish or advance understanding of evidence-based practice through critical exploration of research ethics and approaches.  Critically review literature relevant to occupational therapy and determine how research findings can inform practice. First in the evidence-based practice sequence leading to the development of a proposal and completion of a scholarly study.
